Localization.Description: The EDITF_ATTRIBUTESUBJECTALTNAME2 flag, which allows any user to add the Subject Alternative Name attribute to the certificate signing request, is installed on the certificate server. Using this flag may allow attackers to authenticate on behalf of another user, including the domain administrator

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: EDITF_ATTRIBUTESUBJECTALTNAME2 flag ({object.name}:{object.new_value}) is set on host {event_src.host} to allow an alternative SubjectAccountName to be used for all issued certificates
